name: Food Safety Inspector AI
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure Document Intelligence
services.purpose: Extract structured data from HACCP plans, inspection reports, lab certificates, supplier audits, and food safety checklists

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for HACCP compliance analysis, contamination risk scoring, corrective action generation, regulatory gap identification, and inspector report drafting

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Inspection records, HACCP plan versions, corrective actions, supplier compliance history, traceability chain, lab results

services.name: Azure Event Hubs
services.purpose: Real-time event streaming from IoT temperature sensors in cold chain, processing line monitors, and contamination alert systems

services.name: Azure IoT Hub
services.purpose: Ingest cold chain temperature sensors, humidity monitors, processing line status, and facility environment readings

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Food safety API — inspection workflow engine, HACCP analyzer, traceability service, corrective action tracker, compliance dashboard

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: API keys, IoT device certificates, regulatory system credentials, encryption keys for inspection records

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Inspection pipeline latency, document extraction accuracy, compliance scoring trends, cold chain alert response times

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for routine checklist verification and status reports, reserve GPT-4o for complex HACCP analysis and corrective action generation — saves 60% on AI costs
Pre-build Document Intelligence custom models for standard FDA and USDA form layouts — custom models extract 3x faster than general prebuilt at same cost per page
Cache regulatory requirement lookups with 24-hour TTL — food safety regulations change infrequently and repeated lookups for the same facility type return identical results
Use IoT Hub message routing to filter temperature readings within normal range at ingestion — only process and store out-of-range events to reduce downstream costs by 70%
Batch inspection report generation during off-peak hours — consolidate multiple facility checks into single synthesis calls to minimize GPT-4o invocations
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
